headline: Is Prologis (PLD) Pricing Fair After Recent 1-Year 20.8% Gain?
summary: If you are wondering whether Prologis at around US$128.90 is still a fair deal or starting to look stretched, it helps to step back and separate price moves from underlying value. Over shorter periods the picture is mixed, with a 0.7% return over the last week, a 7.9% decline over the last month, and returns of roughly flat year to date, while the 1 year return sits at 20.8%. Recent headlines around large listed property owners and real estate investment trusts have focused on how investors...
